text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's race day. Past winners offer Kitasan Black
advice and encouragement. However, the
pressure of having to represent her country is
really weighing on her...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, that pressure evaporates as she enters
the paddock, where she's greeted by her fans'
spirited cheering. She realizes they're carrying the
weight along with her as well.
